zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Pye於1460年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可拉文哈姆時，她的父親Sir John Pye25歲，母親Anne Brydges14歲。她於1475年與Henry Munning在英國素福爾可內吉結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1521年11月之後在英國英格蘭素福爾可內吉，埋葬在英國素福爾可內吉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Pye于1460年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可拉文哈姆时，她的父亲Sir John Pye25岁，母亲Anne Brydges14岁。她于1475年与Henry Munning在英国素福爾可內吉结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1521年11月之后在英国英格兰素福爾可內吉，埋葬在英国素福爾可內吉。

nameMeanings.name: Pye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (north-West Midlands, Lancashire, Yorkshire, and Norfolk): nickname from Middle English (Old French) pie ‘magpie’, which could be given to someone who wore black and white clothing, had grey-streaked dark hair, or had a loud, chattering voice and impertinent behaviour, or was cunning or sly. The uncomplimentary senses derive from the bird's behavior and are recorded uses of the word in Middle English and early Modern English.

English: occasionally perhaps a topographic or habitational name referring to a house or inn named Pie ‘magpie’. There were two London taverns so named, but whether these gave rise to a hereditary surname is not known. Surnames derived from house and inn signs are rare in English.
English (of Norman origin): nickname from Anglo-Norman French and Middle English pie ‘merciful, compassionate, kind’, a variant of Old French, Anglo-Norman French piu, peu; see Pew (2).

variants.name: Pew
meanings: English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French pi(u), piw, peu ‘holy, pious’, also ‘merciful, kind, compassionate’.

variants.name: Pyatt
meanings: English (mainly Staffordshire): nickname either from Middle English piot ‘magpie’ (Old French pïot, a diminutive of Old French pie), commonly used to denote a chattering woman, or alternatively from an unrecorded Middle English pyard, an uncomplimentary term derived from the same Old French word + -(h)ard. Compare Pye .
Variant of   Piatt  , a surname of French and Walloon origin.
History: This surname (see 2 above) is listed along with the variant Piatt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Pie
meanings: English: variant of   Pye  , in part a cognate of 2 below.
French: nickname from Old French pie ‘magpie’, perhaps given to a talkative person or someone who had a loud, chattering voice.
French (Pié): variant of Piet ‘foot’. Compare Pease and Pee .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Pye was born in 1460, in Lavenham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Pye, was 25 and her mother, Anne Brydges, was 14. She married Henry Munning in 1475, in Nedging, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died after November 1521, in Nedging, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Nedging, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Pye est née en 1460, à Lavenham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Pye, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Anne Brydges, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Munning en 1475, à Nedging, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après novembre 1521, à Nedging, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Nedging, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Pye 1460 in Lavenham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Pye 25 und ihre Mutter Anne Brydges 14. Sie hat 1475 in Nedging, Suffolk, England Henry Munning geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach November 1521 in Nedging, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Nedging, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Pye è nata il nel 1460 nel Lavenham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John Pye, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Anne Brydges, aveva 14 anni. Lei sposato Henry Munning nel 1475, nel Nedging, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il novembre 1521, nel Nedging, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Nedging, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Pyeが1460年にイギリスイギリススフォルクラベンハムで生まれた時，父Sir John Pyeは25歳，母Anne Brydgesは14歳であった。1475年にイギリススフォルクネドジングでHenry Munningと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1521年11月以後にイギリスイギリススフォルクネドジングで死去し，イギリススフォルクネドジングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Pye(이)가 1460년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 레이븐함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Pye(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Brydges(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 1475년 영국 수폴크 네지잉에서 Henry Munning(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1521년 11월 이후 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 네지잉에서 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 네지잉에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Pye nasceu em 1460, em Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Pye, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Anne Brydges, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Munning em 1475, em Nedging, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após novembro de 1521, em Nedging, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Nedging, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Pye родилась в 1460 г. в местности лавенам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Pye было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Brydges, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Munning в 1475 г. в местности неджинг, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла после ноябрь 1521 г. в местности неджинг, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности неджинг, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Pye nació en 1460, en Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Pye, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Anne Brydges, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Henry Munning en 1475, en Nedging, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de noviembre de 1521, en Nedging, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Nedging, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
